ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your Airtable personal access token.
ast.target: 输入你的 Airtable 个人访问令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 示例：folder1/folder2

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, existing notes will be overwritten when syncing.
ast.target: 启用后，同步时将覆盖现有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the Airtable base you want to import notes from.
ast.target: 选择要从中导入笔记的 Airtable 库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the specific table within the selected base.
ast.target: 选择所选库中的具体表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, changes made in Obsidian will be synced back to Airtable.
ast.target: 启用后，在 Obsidian 中所做的更改将同步回 Airtable。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle conflicts when the same field is modified in both places.
ast.target: 当同一字段在两个位置都被修改时如何处理冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically detect and sync changes made to notes in Obsidian.
ast.target: 自动检测并同步在 Obsidian 中对笔记所做的更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically fetch computed formula and relation results after syncing.
ast.target: 同步后自动获取计算公式和关联结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Slows down all sync operations by 5x for easier testing and observation.
ast.target: 将所有同步操作减速 5 倍，便于测试和观察。
